Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FieldServiceSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FieldServiceSettings2
public class FieldServiceSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for FieldServiceSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FieldServiceSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApptAssistantExpiration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApptAssistantInfoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApptAssistantRadiusUnitValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApptAssistantRadiusValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApptAssistantStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanPopulateGoogleAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanSendAppCenterCrashReports" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanStoreMobileAnalytics" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeepLinkPublicSecurityKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesAllowEditSaForCrew" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesShareSaParentWoWithAr" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesShareSaWithAr" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldServiceNotificationsOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldServiceOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsBatchWindowEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFloatingWorkOrderEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGeoCodeSyncEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLocationHistoryEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPopulateWorkOrderAddressEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkOrdersEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkPlansAutoGenerationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkStepManualStatusUpdateEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FieldServiceSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MobileFeedbackEmails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="O2EngineEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptimizationServiceAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceAppointmentsDueDateOffsetOrgValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkOrderDurationSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkOrderLineItemSearchFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkOrderSearchFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
